input.command:
python3 -c "
import json
fname = 'articles/2026/02/17/articles.jsonl'
kws = ['t20', 'ice hockey', 'winter olym', 'medal', 'iran', 'state of union', 'doge', 'democratic', 'hezbollah', 'ukraine', 'chelsea', 'manchester united', 'carrick', 'benfica', 'real madrid', 'champions league']
with open(fname) as f:
    for line in f:
        art = json.loads(line)
        title = (art.get('title','') or '').lower()
        for kw in kws:
            if kw in title:
                print(f'[{kw}] {(art.get(\"title\",\"\") or \"\")[:120]}')
                break
" 2>/dev/null | head -40
